title: Minimal subset — exercises topology switch / recycle-on-run
description: Targets the 'minimal' topology (the Showcase block alone). Running it from a host on a different topology exercises recycle-on-run: the host recycles onto 'minimal' with a clean slate before the run. Keeps the assertions trivial — its job is to drive the topology switch, not to test the block.

steps.label: run the timer for three virtual seconds
the staged value held on the recycled host
the timer advanced after the recycle
